## Examples

<Tabs>
  <Tab title="API Request">
    ```bash
    curl -H 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' \
      'https://example.com/api'
    ```
  </Tab>
</Tabs>

This request should finish in <200ms for healthy tenants.

- Fast mode—best for exact lookups

<Info>
  Reads organization-wide content by default.
</Info>
